# Embedded Fonts

These fonts are embedded into Pulp plugins at build time for deterministic text rendering.

| Font | License | Source |
|------|---------|--------|
| Inter Regular | SIL Open Font License 1.1 | https://github.com/rsms/inter |
| JetBrains Mono Regular | SIL Open Font License 1.1 | https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono |

Both fonts are used under the SIL OFL 1.1 which permits bundling in software.
